title: Trans-Iranian Railway Cumulative Cost Through 1938-39 — Fiscal Context for the 1925 Sugar/Tea Excise Monopoly Tax
source_org: Wikipedia 'Trans-Iranian Railway' article, citing Mikiya Koyagi's research
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION via WebFetch, direct fetch and confirmation.
time_coverage: single cumulative figure through fiscal year 1938-39
notes: Single contextual data point only, included to quantify the scale of the 1925 sugar/tea excise tax's most famous use (railway financing), which is otherwise documented only qualitatively in existing project sources (data/raw/pahlavi-era-primary-extraction/iranica-fiscal-system-narrative-series-1921-1979/ and Encyclopaedia Iranica FISCAL SYSTEM v. PAHLAVI PERIOD, already in data/raw/encyclopaedia-iranica/fiscal-system-v-pahlavi-period/). A genuine, repeatedly-searched-for target of this hunt -- a year-by-year sugar/tea tax REVENUE series (as opposed to this one cumulative railway-cost figure) -- was NOT found in freely accessible sources. Logged as a dead end; see failures.
failures: Could not find a year-by-year or commodity-disaggregated (sugar vs. tea specifically) tax REVENUE series for the 1925-1941 excise/monopoly period despite multiple targeted searches. Likely exists in primary Majles budget-law archives (data/raw/majlis-historical-budget-laws/ already in this project) or Bharier/Karshenas's underlying tables (cited secondhand throughout Encyclopaedia Iranica but not reproduced in full online) -- a lead for a future session with access to those primary archives or the underlying academic monographs (not just their Iranica citations).
